evidence.description: Reza Pahlavi has called for the IRGC to be proscribed as a terrorist organization. In a February 2023 Daily Telegraph interview, he advocated for IRGC designation by the British government. In April 2026, he called on IRGC members to step down.

editorial_notes: Pahlavi has consistently called for IRGC proscription as terrorist organization. Called on IRGC to step down in April 2026.
